_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national autopilot
_meta.note: GA federal House batch-8 + HI start: andrew-clyde (R GA-09, won 2026 primary 75.9%), barry-loudermilk (R GA-11, retirement confirmed 2026-02-04), rick-allen (R GA-12), clay-fuller (R GA-14, special-election winner sworn in 2026-04-14 — thin new-member record, social-media protocol), ed-case (D HI-01, Blue Dog — SAVE Act 2025 crossover credited). Every TRUE/FALSE cites roll calls, sponsorships, ratings, or the member's own statements; nulls where no evidence.

profile.background: U.S. Navy 28 years incl. three combat deployments (Kuwait/Iraq); founder of Clyde Armory firearms retailer (1991); U.S. House since 2021. Heritage Action 100% (119th session) / 98% lifetime; GOA A+ champion.
profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-10 — evidence-finalized from clerk.house.gov roll calls, govtrack/govinfo sponsorships, Heritage Action, GOA, SBA Pro-Life. Won the 2026-05-19 GOP primary with 75.9% over Couvillon and Poole; Nov 3 general.

andrew-clyde.notes_set: Evidence-scored 2026-06-10. Near-perfect conservative record (Heritage 100%/98%): Life at Conception cosponsor, Yea Born-Alive twice, Nay WHPA, Nay RFMA + Equality Act, Yea both women's-sports bills, Yea H.R.2 + Laken Riley + SAVE Acts, Nay HR1/HR4, Yea CBDC bans + anti-ESG CRA, BBA cosponsor + Nay FY23 omnibus and FRA debt deal. Signature 2A leadership: SHORT Act sponsor, drove OBBBA zeroing of the $200 NFA tax, pistol-brace CRA sponsor, Hughes-repeal cosponsor. Restraint deviations: Nay 2002-AUMF repeal (Roll 2021-172), Nay Iran WPR (Roll 2026-85); but Nay on ALL April 2024 supplementals incl. Israel (fiscal grounds). $1,000 career AIPAC-linked money per TrackAIPAC.

profile.religion: Christian (Protestant); authored 'And Then They Prayed: Moments in American History Impacted by Prayer' (2011); WallBuilders regular
profile.background: USAF veteran (1984-92); IT business owner; GA House 2005-11, GA Senate 2011-14; U.S. House since 2015. Heritage Action 92% (119th) / 89% lifetime. Chaired the House Admin probe of the J6 Select Committee.
profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-10 — evidence-finalized from clerk.house.gov roll calls, govtrack cosponsorships, Heritage Action, his own statements. Retirement CONFIRMED: announced 2026-02-04 he will not seek a 7th term ('a service, not a career'); serves out the 119th. Open-seat GOP runoff 2026-06-16: Cowan vs. Adkerson; Dem nominee Chris Harden.

barry-loudermilk.notes_set: Evidence-scored 2026-06-10. Retiring (announced 2026-02-04); straight-conservative roll-call record (Heritage 92%/89%): Life at Conception + No Taxpayer Funding cosponsor, Yea Born-Alive twice, Nay WHPA/RFMA/Equality Act, Yea both women's-sports bills, ECCA school-choice cosponsor, Yea Parents BoR, SAVE Acts, Nay HR1/HR4, ACE Act (Zuckerbucks ban) cosponsor, Yea H.R.2 + Laken Riley twice, Nay AWB + red-flag act, Yea pistol-brace CRA, Audit-the-Fed + CBDC-ban cosponsor, BBA Yea 2018. Deviations vs rubric: Nay 2002-AUMF repeal; Yea Israel supplemental + Peace through Strength consistent with $78,182 career AIPAC-aligned money (TrackAIPAC); Yea OBBBA (deficit tension vs BBA vote). 2017 congressional-baseball-shooting survivor — vocal carry advocate after.

rick-allen.notes_set: Evidence-scored 2026-06-10. Solid conservative record with openly faith-driven framing (read Romans 1 to the GOP conference before a 2016 SOGI vote; Prayer Caucus chairman): Life at Conception cosponsor (118th+119th), Yea Born-Alive twice, Nay WHPA/RFMA/Equality Act, Yea both women's-sports bills, ECCA cosponsor, Yea Parents BoR, own anti-CRT op-ed, faith-based-adoption (Child Welfare Provider Inclusion Act) cosponsor, SAVE Acts, Nay HR1/HR4, Yea H.R.2 + Laken Riley, Birthright Citizenship Act cosponsor (116th+119th), Nay AWB, pistol-brace CRA Yea, CBDC-ban Aye, Audit-the-Fed cosponsor, floor-led anti-ESG CRA. Deviations vs rubric: Aye FRA debt-limit deal (Roll 2023-243), Nay 2002-AUMF repeal, AIPAC endorsee with ~$10k pro-Israel PAC money (TrackAIPAC/OpenSecrets). No cross-party defections found.

profile.religion: Christian ('devout Christian… the U.S. Constitution and American way of life were inspired by the teachings of Christ' — own campaign site); denomination not documented
profile.background: b. 1981; Emory BA, Cornell MPA, SMU JD; USAF JAG 2010-14, GA Air National Guard Lt Col (Kuwait 2024); White House Fellow 2018-19; DA, Lookout Mountain Judicial Circuit 2023-26. Won the 2026-04-07 GA-14 special-election runoff 55.9% over Shawn Harris (D) after Marjorie Taylor Greene's resignation; sworn in 2026-04-14. Small Business + Transportation; Second Amendment Caucus.
profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-10 — evidence-scored via the social-media/new-member protocol: own campaign-site statements, sponsored H.J.Res.172, endorsements (Trump, Club for Growth), news Q&As. Brand-new member — no Heritage Action score yet (119th scorecard published before he was sworn in); skipped iVoterGuide and Ballotpedia questionnaires, so social/cultural categories are genuinely thin. Won the May 2026 GOP nomination; Nov 2026 rematch vs. Harris.

clay-fuller.notes_set: Evidence-scored 2026-06-10 (new member, thin record — nulls are honest gaps, not omissions). Documented: 'Mass Deportations Now… finish the wall' platform in his own words; sponsored H.J.Res.172 constitutional amendment against birthright citizenship for illegal aliens' children ('anchor babies… It must end'); devout-Christian self-identification; Trump 'Complete and Total Endorsement' + Club for Growth PAC endorsement; 10-of-10 self-rated Trump-agenda support. Deviation vs restraint rubric: vocal Iran-war defender ('death cult that cannot be negotiated with'; praised the strikes) — q1 FALSE on his own words; his Iran WPR vote (Roll 2026-199) could not be individually verified (clerk 403; only 4 GOP yeas reported, none him) so q0 left null. $3,500 career AIPAC-linked money per TrackAIPAC. Re-check after a full session of roll calls.

profile.background: Lawyer; HI House 1994-2002 (Majority Leader); U.S. House 2002-07 (HI-02) and 2019-present (HI-01); House Appropriations. Blue Dog Coalition — co-chair, Blue Dog Task Force on Fiscal Responsibility. Heritage Action 1% lifetime / 5% (118th).
profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-10 — evidence-finalized from clerk.house.gov roll calls, his own statements, Ballotpedia, TrackAIPAC. Seeking re-election 2026: faces a serious 2026-08-08 Democratic-primary challenge (Della Au Belatti, Jarrett Keohokalole) explicitly over his votes with Republicans, led by the SAVE Act; GOP: Maxwell Frazier; general Nov 3. Re-elected 71.8% in 2024 (D+13).

ed-case.notes_set: Evidence-scored 2026-06-10. Blue Dog Democrat (Heritage 1% lifetime) — progressive on social policy by roll call: Yea WHPA, Nay Born-Alive twice, Yea RFMA + Equality Act, Nay both women's-sports bills, No Parents BoR, Yea HR1/HR4, Nay H.R.2 + Laken Riley, Yea AWB + federal red-flag, Nay pistol-brace CRA, Nay anti-ESG CRA, No CBDC ban, No Freedom for Health Care Workers. CROSSOVERS credited: Yea SAVE Act 2025 (Roll 2025-102, 1 of 4 Dems; 'Noncitizen voting is illegal… fears of voter suppression… are overstated' — flipped from No on the 2024 version, and it's now the centerpiece of his 2026 primary challenge); genuine fiscal-hawk record (Blue Dog BBA/PAYGO blueprint co-author; threatened the $3.5T reconciliation in 2021 — but Aye FRA deal + Yea FY23 omnibus); restraint: Yea 2002-AUMF repeal and Yea BOTH 2026 Iran war-powers resolutions (Rolls 2026-85, 2026-199). Yea all four April 2024 foreign-aid supplementals; ~$40,000 career AIPAC/Israel-lobby money per TrackAIPAC.
